policy.hard_rule: Any ticket reporting phishing, malware, or a suspected breach is P1 and routed to Security Operations, whatever else it says. Nothing is auto-resolved or auto-actioned; the agent drafts and a human acts.

priority_guide.P1: Company-wide outage, a security report, a whole team unable to work, or a VIP fully blocked.
priority_guide.P2: A team affected with a workaround, a single user fully blocked, or a VIP affected.
priority_guide.P3: A single user with a workaround or minor impact.
priority_guide.P4: Routine service requests (equipment, software, access, how-to).
